input.notes: Specialties: knotless, boho, cornrows. Wants more bookings from TikTok/IG.

campaign.classification_reason: Brick-and-mortar braiding salon in Brooklyn. Physical craft with visible transformation — authenticity and real footage outperform any AI-generated concept. Category B: smartphone shot lists, not generated video.

pattern_recognition.core_viral_loop: Transformation payoff + process satisfaction. Braiding is one of the few niches where the WORK ITSELF is the content: clean parts, fast hands, and a dramatic reveal create a complete emotional arc in under 30 seconds. The loop: curiosity hook (flash of finished look or top-down part pattern) -> process retention (ASMR/timelapse) -> emotional payoff (client reaction) -> SMS CTA while dopamine is high.
funnel_blueprint: Viewer watches transformation reel to the reveal (high completion rate signals push distribution)
Inbound SMS hits the NewSites Twilio webhook -> keyword BRAIDS matched
AI auto-reply fires in seconds: booking link + price menu + style question
Lead logged in CRM under African Queen with style interest captured
No booking in 24h -> automated follow-up text with an open-slot nudge

platform_matrix.tiktok: Raw, fast-cut transformations on trending native audio — imperfect is better, polish kills reach here.
platform_matrix.instagram: Polished Reels + carousel style catalogs; the grid is the portfolio that closes hesitant bookers.
platform_matrix.facebook: Voiceover versions with local framing ("Pitkin Ave, Brooklyn") — this is where 30+ local bookers actually convert; boost winners to a 5-mile radius.
platform_matrix.x: Skip as a primary channel for this niche; repost top Reels at zero extra effort only.

campaigns.title: The Reveal
campaigns.concept: Full before/after knotless transformation compressed into 22 seconds. Open on a 0.5s flash of the finished look (curiosity spike), hard cut to the before, sprint through the process, land on the client reaction.

shot_list.phone_position: Chest height, arm's length, like you're on FaceTime
shot_list.action: HALF a second of the FINISHED hair (steal this clip from shot 6 when you edit in CapCut), then hard cut

shot_list.phone_position: Two hands on the phone at chest height, walk a slow half-circle around the chair
shot_list.action: The BEFORE: she's seated, natural hair out, looking at the camera like it's a normal photo

shot_list.phone_position: Stand behind the chair, hold the phone FLAT over her head like you're filming a plate of food from above, about a ruler's length up
shot_list.action: The comb drawing the part line + gel going on. Volume ON — the comb and gel sound IS the video

shot_list.phone_position: Prop the phone on the counter behind the chair (lean it on anything), whole chair in the screen
shot_list.action: Open Camera > Time-lapse, hit record, forget it for the whole appointment

shot_list.phone_position: Crouch behind her, start the phone down by her lower back, slowly raise it straight up to the top of her head
shot_list.action: The finished braids, bottom to top, nice and slow

shot_list.phone_position: Stand right next to the mirror, phone pointed at her FACE not the hair
shot_list.action: She sees herself for the FIRST time — do not let her peek before this. Her real reaction is the whole video

shot_list.phone_position: Hold steady on the finished hair
shot_list.action: 2 seconds of the final look — you'll type 'Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363' over it in CapCut

text_overlays: Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — booked in 60 seconds
campaigns.cta_line: Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — our AI answers in seconds with prices & open slots.

captions.tiktok: 6 hours of knotless in 22 seconds 😮‍💨 Brooklyn — text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 and you are booked before this video ends.
captions.instagram: Knotless boho, medium, mid-back ✨ Done at African Queen Braiding, Pitkin Ave BK. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — instant prices + booking, no DM waiting.
captions.facebook: Brooklyn! This is a full knotless install at African Queen Braiding, 1629 Pitkin Ave. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 and our system replies instantly with prices and open slots.

campaigns.proof_of_concept: Before/after reveal is the dominant organic format in every appearance-transformation niche (hair, detailing, renovation) because the payoff is visual, universal, and completes an emotional arc — completion rate is the strongest distribution signal on TikTok and Reels. Adding a genuine first-look reaction stacks a second archetype (reaction reveal) on top of the first.

campaigns.title: Parting Pattern ASMR
campaigns.concept: No talking, no music for the first 5 seconds — just top-down crisp parting, gel, and comb audio. Pure process satisfaction for the braid-content audience that watches these on loop.

shot_list.phone_position: Flat over her head like a food video, hold as still as you can
shot_list.action: The comb draws ONE slow, perfectly straight part line. No music, no talking — real sound only
Gel on the fresh part, fingers smoothing it down

shot_list.phone_position: Step around to her side, get the phone close to her hands
shot_list.action: The first three stitches of the braid — fingers moving fast, you can see the hair pulled tight

shot_list.phone_position: Back flat over the top of her head
shot_list.action: The whole finished grid of parts before any hair goes in — this is the money shot people rewatch
2 seconds — text goes on top in CapCut: 'This precision is why. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363'

text_overlays: POV: your braider actually takes her time on parts
campaigns.cta_line: Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — our AI answers in seconds with prices & open slots.

captions.tiktok: The parts ARE the flex. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — instant booking, Brooklyn.
captions.instagram: Precision parts, every install. African Queen Braiding, Brooklyn. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363.
captions.facebook: This is the difference between a $90 install and ours. African Queen Braiding, 1629 Pitkin Ave. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363.

campaigns.proof_of_concept: ASMR process content is a proven retention archetype: real work audio + visible precision holds watch time without any hook writing. In hair specifically, parting-pattern top-downs are rewatched and shared as quality proof — the part grid is the niche shorthand for "this braider is worth the price."

campaigns.title: The 6AM Chair
campaigns.concept: Behind-the-scenes authority: opening the shop, first client of the day in the chair while the block is still dark. Positions African Queen as the hardest-working braider on Pitkin Ave — local authority converts on Facebook.

shot_list.phone_position: Just hold the phone in one hand and walk — like you're vlogging
shot_list.action: Unlocking the gate while the street is still dark, lights flicking on inside

shot_list.phone_position: Prop the phone on the counter facing the chair
shot_list.action: First client sits down, cape goes on — make sure the wall clock showing the early time is in the shot
The install running while the sun comes up through the window behind them

shot_list.phone_position: Hold the phone and follow her — like filming a friend leaving a party
shot_list.action: She checks the mirror, smiles, walks out the door into full daylight

shot_list.phone_position: Hold steady on the empty chair or the finished look
shot_list.action: 2 seconds — text on top: 'Early slots go first. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363'

text_overlays: She has a 9AM flight. We got her.
Early slots go first — text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363
campaigns.voiceover: While the block is still asleep, the chair is already full. If you need your hair done before work, before a flight, before life starts — text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 and our system books you in seconds.
campaigns.cta_line: Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 — our AI answers in seconds with prices & open slots.

captions.tiktok: 6AM client hours. Brooklyn braiders built different. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363.
captions.instagram: The 6AM chair 🕕 Early appointments at African Queen Braiding, Pitkin Ave. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363.
captions.facebook: We open early for a reason — Brooklyn does not wait. African Queen Braiding, 1629 Pitkin Ave. Text BRAIDS to (347) 302-9363 for early slots before they go.

campaigns.proof_of_concept: Day-in-the-life / behind-the-scenes is the trust archetype: it converts local audiences who already saw a transformation reel but need a reason to choose YOU. Work-ethic framing (early hours, real street, real shop) is the strongest authority signal for location-based service businesses on Facebook, where local bookers actually transact.

campaign.posting_cadence: Minimum 1 transformation reel per day — the tripod stays behind the chair and EVERY client becomes content (get a quick verbal OK, offer $10 off for on-camera reactions). Batch-film: one Saturday of shooting = a full week of posts. ASMR and BTS formats fill non-appointment days.

sms_flow.auto_reply: Thanks for texting BRAIDS! Tap to see prices & book instantly: {BOOKING_LINK}. Reply with what you want + your day, and we will lock you in.
